name: single_turn_conversation
description: single user input and assistant text output

operations.author: user
operations.text: Hello assistant

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Hello, how can I help?

name: multi_turn_conversation
description: multiple user and assistant turns are replayed in order

operations.author: user
operations.text: Plan a trip to Shenzhen

operations.author: agent
operations.text: I can help with transport and food.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Keep it under 1000 yuan

operations.author: agent
operations.text: I will optimize for budget travel.

name: tool_call_conversation
description: function_call and function_response parts survive backend replay

operations.author: user
operations.text: What is the weather in Beijing?

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Beijing is sunny and 29 C.

name: state_overwrite
description: session, app, user, and temp state updates follow storage semantics

operations.author: user
operations.text: Remember my dashboard choices

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Saved your dashboard choices.

name: memory_preference_write_read
description: stored session memory can retrieve a user preference

operations.author: user
operations.text: I prefer jasmine tea in the afternoon.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: I will remember your jasmine tea preference.

name: memory_fact_write_read
description: stored session memory can retrieve a factual note

operations.author: user
operations.text: My project codename is Blue River.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Noted the Blue River project codename.

name: summary_create_update
description: summary can be generated and then updated after later turns

operations.author: user
operations.text: We need a launch checklist for Friday.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Checklist includes QA, docs, and rollback plan.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Add owner Alice for QA.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Alice owns QA before launch.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Bob owns release notes.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Bob owns release notes for Friday.

name: summary_event_truncation
description: summary anchor plus retained recent events reconstruct context after compression

operations.author: user
operations.text: Long discussion part one about onboarding.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Onboarding needs account setup and training.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Include security approval before access.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Security approval comes before account access.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Schedule training on Wednesday.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Training is scheduled on Wednesday.

operations.author: user
operations.text: After summary, remind me about Wednesday training.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: I will keep Wednesday training in context.

name: failed_append_recovery
description: a failed append before persistence leaves no dirty event or dirty state

operations.author: user
operations.text: This event is persisted.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: This failed event must not persist.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: State remains clean after recovery.

name: duplicate_event_write_recovery
description: a failed retry with a duplicate event id leaves no duplicate event, dirty state, or stale text

operations.author: user
operations.text: This event is persisted once.

operations.author: user
operations.text: This duplicate retry must not persist.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Duplicate retry did not change stored context.

name: repeat_memory_store
description: repeating the same memory write does not duplicate retrieved memories

operations.author: user
operations.text: I like quiet focus blocks in the morning.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: I will remember your quiet focus block preference.

name: partial_event_not_persisted
description: streaming partial events are ignored and only final events are replayed

operations.author: user
operations.text: Stream the answer, then persist only the final response.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: draft chunk that must not persist

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Final streamed answer persisted once.

name: cross_session_user_isolation
description: multiple sessions and users keep session state, events, and memory keys scoped correctly

operations.author: user
operations.text: Alpha session prefers red tea.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Alpha red tea preference is recorded.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Beta session prefers green tea.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Beta green tea preference is recorded.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Outsider session prefers black coffee.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Outsider black coffee preference is recorded.

name: event_metadata_roundtrip
description: optional event metadata survives backend serialization and replay

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Internal planning note should keep visibility metadata.

name: multi_part_event_roundtrip
description: events with multiple ordered parts keep mixed text, function_call, and function_response payloads

parts.text: I will calculate the route first.

name: memory_after_summary_truncation
description: memory stored after summary compression can still recall summarized facts and retained recent facts

operations.author: user
operations.text: Mercury milestone belongs to Alice.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Alice owns the Mercury milestone.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Jupiter launch belongs to Bob.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Bob owns the Jupiter launch.

name: memory_multi_result_recall
description: multiple matching memories are recalled without dropping records across backends

operations.author: user
operations.text: Orchid note one is about calm mornings.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Orchid note one is stored.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Orchid note two is about quiet afternoons.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Orchid note two is stored.

name: cross_session_summary_isolation
description: summaries for two sessions under one user keep owner, version, and text isolated without depending on backend event-window trimming

operations.author: user
operations.text: Alpha roadmap starts with billing cleanup.

operations.author: user
operations.text: Beta roadmap starts with search ranking.
